message:
test: fix inspector tab label assertion and run perf envelope checks (1mfw3.6.5)

Fix: InspectorTab::HitRegions.label() returns "Hits" not "Hit Regions".
Performance envelope: 2989 lib tests, 74 cross-workstream integration tests,
36 perf-specific tests (resize_storm, degradation, cockpit, timeline) — all green.
